summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue involves a UI problem in Plone's discussion feature. When a user clicks "Reply" to an existing comment without being logged in, two fields appear instead of one, causing confusion.

## What needs to be done
The goal is to improve the user interface so that the extra reply field is hidden when a user clicks "Reply" on a comment. Also, clearer labels can be added to distinguish between the reply and adding a new comment.

## Helpful background
This issue is categorized as a regression in the UI/UX of Plone's discussion feature. Discussions suggest that although there is a general understanding of the problem, there isn't a consensus on the best approach to fix it. 

## Good first steps
1. Familiarize yourself with the existing UI for replies in Plone’s discussion component.
2. Review the screenshots and comments to understand user confusion.
3. Consider how to implement a solution for hiding the bottom field and improving label clarity.
4. Coordinate with other contributors for feedback and guidance as needed.
5. Testing should include user experience checks after any changes.
```
